title: RESTful API and Cloud Source Sync
objective: 建立 RESTful API 与 GitHub Obsidian_vault 云端真源同步层，替代本地硬编码路径，并为管理端提供文件树、内容读取、发布清单与预览接口

tasks.title: Design RESTful API contract
acceptance_criteria: API contract covers source tree, file content, normalized content items, publish manifest, preview and verify endpoints
Contract separates read-only operations from local admin write operations
External write operations remain gated and excluded from default API behavior
tasks.notes: Contract first; implementation follows after human review.

tasks.title: Configure GitHub Obsidian source adapter
acceptance_criteria: Hardcoded local Obsidian path is replaced by documented configuration
Public GitHub blob/raw URL mapping is supported for cloud source links
Private repository token handling is documented and never exposed to client-side code
tasks.notes: Network access and GitHub reads are L3; writes to GitHub remain L4.

tasks.title: Normalize Markdown metadata and source records
acceptance_criteria: Normalized records include id, title, path, sourceUrl, rawUrl, updatedAt, tags, status and media references
Normalized records include embedding-ready text fields, stable chunk ids and graph classification metadata
Frontmatter parse failures are reported without crashing unrelated records
Generated records preserve enough provenance for admin review
tasks.notes: Keep generated local index files out of Git unless explicitly intended.

tasks.title: Define publish manifest schema
acceptance_criteria: Manifest records the whitelist of public source files and their public metadata overrides
Manifest distinguishes source path, public slug, public status and review notes
Manifest can drive user-facing public projection without exposing the full Obsidian vault
tasks.notes: The manifest is the boundary between private source truth and public projection.

tasks.title: Implement local API skeleton
acceptance_criteria: Local API can serve source tree, source file metadata and publish manifest data
API is bound to 127.0.0.1 by default for local admin usage
No deployment, remote mutation or token-bearing browser endpoint is introduced
tasks.notes: Implementation choice should respect the existing Astro/Node project shape.

tasks.title: Add preview API contracts
acceptance_criteria: Preview contract covers Markdown, PDF, image, code, Typst and LaTeX preview categories
Unsupported file types have a safe metadata-only fallback
Preview endpoints never leak local absolute paths to public user surfaces
tasks.notes: Full preview implementation is scheduled for S10.

tasks.title: Document API security and permissions
acceptance_criteria: Admin API local-only default is documented
Public user frontend cannot access secrets or private source files
L3 reads and L4 writes are explicitly separated
tasks.notes: This task prevents accidental admin exposure during later development.
